title: DeepSeek-V4: 1M-Token Context Window Now Available for Agents
summary: DeepSeek-V4 introduces a one-million-token context window, making it the largest available. This breakthrough enables agents to process extensive documents and conversations with unprecedented context retention.
body:
DeepSeek-V4, the latest model from DeepSeek, now supports a one-million-token context window. This makes it the largest context window available, surpassing previous models like Claude 3.5 Sonnet and GPT-4o. The model is designed to be used by agents, enabling them to handle extensive documents and long conversations without losing context.

The massive context window allows agents to process entire books, lengthy research papers, or extended customer service interactions in a single prompt. This capability is particularly useful for applications requiring deep understanding and retention of large amounts of information. The model's efficiency in handling such large contexts sets a new standard for AI agents.

DeepSeek-V4's release has sparked discussions about the future of AI agents. While the model's capabilities are impressive, questions remain about the practicality and cost of running such large contexts. Developers and researchers are eager to explore the model's potential, and early feedback suggests it could revolutionize fields like legal analysis, medical diagnosis, and complex customer support.
twitterThread: 🚀 DeepSeek-V4 just dropped a ONE MILLION token context window. That's not a typo. Here's why this changes everything.
Most models struggle with long contexts. DeepSeek-V4? It eats them for breakfast. Entire books. Full customer service histories. No context loss.
Here's why this matters: Agents can now process massive documents in a single prompt. No more chopping up texts. No more losing the thread.
The wild part? It's open-source. Developers can start playing with it today. Let that sink in.
This changes everything for fields like legal analysis, medical diagnosis, and complex customer support. AI agents just got a massive upgrade.
standaloneTweet: DeepSeek-V4 just launched with a ONE MILLION token context window. This is a game-changer for AI agents. https://ainformed.dev/articles/2026-04-24-deepseek-v4-1m-token-context-window-now-available-for-agents
